acquisition_scope: Immutable arXiv v1 paper plus the paper-linked project site, the review-task-pinned official GitHub revision, and renewed Hugging Face access-state evidence. This is source acquisition and extraction, not a deep review or release-conformance audit.

paper.title: AgenticVBench: Can AI Agents Complete Real-World Post-Production Tasks?

code_release.archive_integrity: Python ZipFile.testzip returned no corrupt member; archive contains 1,593 entries and 7,854,067 uncompressed bytes.
code_release.tree_api_summary: The recursive tree response was not truncated and records 1,592 entries, including 872 blobs totaling 7,854,067 bytes. The archive exposes a large tasks tree, but task inventory and release correspondence were not audited during acquisition.
code_release.timing_boundary: The pinned revision is dated 2026-07-15, about seven weeks after immutable arXiv v1. It is acquisition-time release evidence and is not asserted to be the exact paper-time implementation.

dataset_access_state.interpretation: A fresh unauthenticated GET returned HTTP 401. This preserves only acquisition-time access state; it does not establish that the dataset never existed, is permanently private, or is unavailable to authenticated users.

verification.paper_extraction: The non-empty extraction was inspected across the abstract and construction sections, task-family and denominator definitions, experimental setup and replication appendix, expert calibration and inter-expert agreement appendix, cost audit, verifier formulas, and final page. It reaches PDF page 22 coherently. Equations and figure/table layout remain more authoritative in the PDF/HTML.
verification.withdrawal_check: The immutable v1 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
verification.release_archive: The pinned archive passed integrity testing and its top-level task/code/documentation structure was enumerated. No task-by-task audit or execution was performed.
verification.claim_boundary: No deep review, task-release correspondence claim, source-rights conclusion, professional-representativeness claim, expert-acceptance claim, temporal-correctness claim, human-equivalence claim, harness-causality claim, model-capability claim, or readiness claim is made by this acquisition record.
